components.label: Role Badge
components.purpose: Display Admin or Editor role context without enabling login/Auth.

components.label: Assignment Status Card
components.purpose: Show planned assignment state: assigned, returned, held, archived, or admin review.

components.label: Readiness Summary Card
components.purpose: Show references, attribution, layout and evidence readiness from governed records.

components.label: Reference Status Panel
components.purpose: Static panel for reference status and editorial verification planning.

components.label: Attribution Status Panel
components.purpose: Static panel for image/object credit and attribution planning.

components.label: Object Tool Browser Panel
components.purpose: Static panel listing images, graphs, tables, infographics, diagrams and textual tools without execution.

components.label: Evidence Checklist Panel
components.purpose: Static panel for Admin evidence review checklist.

components.label: Delta Review Panel
components.purpose: Static panel for intended file/public surface delta review.

components.label: Disabled Decision Button Group
components.purpose: Display Archive, Return, Publish and Publish-and-close as disabled/plan-only actions.

components.label: Non-Execution Warning
components.purpose: Display that this scaffold is non-runtime, non-publish, no-backend and no-deploy.
